justifiable_conditions: Partially justifiable if repo has default read-only token setting enforced at org level
Partially justifiable for very long but expected builds (e.g. full C++ compilation suites)
Justifiable if workflow does not depend on specific system library or tool versions
Justifiable for workflows that intentionally test fresh installs or audit dependency resolution
Partially justifiable if workflows diverge intentionally across environments
Never justifiable — always an injection/exposure risk
Not justifiable — static keys silently serve stale dependencies
Justifiable only on optional/informational steps (e.g. coverage upload, notification steps)

rule_name: Privileged Trigger Exposing Secrets to Fork Code
justifiable_conditions: Justifiable only for labelling/commenting workflows that explicitly need write access and are fully hardened
